title: leontodon angustifolius
intro: Leontodon angustifolius, also known as narrow-leaved hawk's beard or sharp-leaved sow thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a biennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, roots, and flowers. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Leontodon angustifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
